Case Arising From
CIVIL ORIGINAL JURISDICTION: Suo Motu Writ Petition (Civil)

(Under Article 32 of The Constitution of India)
In Re: Recruitment Of Visually Impaired In Judicial Services
With

and 3497 of 2025 and Writ Petition (Civil) Nos. 484 and 494 of 2024
